eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mason, MI; at 6:12 AM on OCT 9, 2019 Effective until 6:27 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System originating from the Mason County Emergency Operations Center. If this had been an actual emergency, such as a toxic materials release, evacuation, shelter in place warning, 9-1-1 telephone outage, or other local emergency that affects your safety, official messages would have followed the alert tone. This concludes this test of the Emergency Alert System.
